name: Aenvir
bio:
Physical Appearance: Bosmer (Wood Elf) male with the lean build of a hunter. Wears practical light armor - a cuirass and boots suited for quick movement. Sometimes wears additional armor pieces including gauntlets, greaves, or a helmet. Carries a dagger and possesses oiled linen shoes and a coarse linen shirt as spare clothing.
Race: Bosmer
Personality Keywords: criminal, opportunistic, hunter, former employee, thief
Role: Aenvir is a Wood Elf hunter who has turned to crime. He is a former employee of Lelles' Quality Merchandise, where he once worked legitimately and was even trusted with keys to open the shop in the mornings. Now, along with his companions Dranas Lerano and Storn the Burly, he has been regularly robbing his former employer's store over the past few months.
Daily Routine: Aenvir spends his time loitering near Lelles' Quality Merchandise, watching and waiting. Between 10pm and 4am, he and his companions break into the shop to steal merchandise, using his knowledge of the store's layout and his key to gain entry.
Personality - The Turncoat Thief: Aenvir has abandoned honest work for a life of crime, betraying the trust his former employer placed in him. As a hunter, he's patient and observant, skills that serve him well in his criminal enterprise. He works with Dranas and Storn as part of a coordinated theft operation, using his insider knowledge and access to repeatedly rob the shop that once employed him.
author: Bethesda
